---
title: "Gene expression project"
subtitle: "Analysis script"
author: "Bernice Sepers & Ane Liv Berthelsen"

format:
  #html: 
  pdf: 
    papersize: "a4paper"
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-title: "Contents"
    number-sections: FALSE
    documentclass: article
    geometry:
      - inner=3cm
      - outer=3cm
      - top=2cm
      - bottom=3cm
      - headsep=22pt
      - headheight=11pt
      - footskip=33pt
      - ignorehead
      - ignorefoot
      - heightrounded
    fig-pos: 'h'
    fig-cap-location: bottom
    tbl-cap-location: top
editor: visual
date: 11/20/2023
mainfont: Times New Roman
---

```{r}
#install.packages("here")
#install.packages("pacman")
library(here)
here::here()
```

```{r}
#| label: packages
#| echo: FALSE
#here::here()
invisible(pacman::p_load(dplyr, readxl, tidyverse, cowplot, edgeR, DESeq2, RColorBrewer, ggplot2, reshape2, ggpubr, extrafont, pheatmap))

#font_import()
#fonts()
#cowplot for toggling with plots
#edgeR  loads limma as a dependency, limma for analysing microassay and RNA seq data
#DESeq2 needed for rowCounts
#reshape2 needed for the first plot
#ggpubr need to bind plots together
#extrafont for arial font
#pheatmap needed for heatmaps
```

# Data

```{r}
#| label: load_data
#| echo: FALSE
#Load in the filtered data
#Mutate all needed predictors into factors
d_n<-readRDS("rnaseq_filtered_Liv.Rdata")  
#dim(d_n) 12639 rows

#Sequencing depth
sequences <- read.delim("multiqc_fastqc.txt", header = TRUE, sep = "\t")
sum(sequences$Total.Sequences)
summary(sequences$Total.Sequences)

## White blood counts
WBC <- read_excel("WBCcounts_GEP.xlsx")

##Combined
d_n$samples <- left_join(d_n$samples, WBC, by = "Sample")
head(d_n$samples)
d_n$samples$Diff_Neutro <- as.numeric(d_n$samples$Diff_Neutro)
d_n$samples$Diff_Eo <- as.numeric(d_n$samples$Diff_Eo)
d_n$samples$Diff_Baso <- as.numeric(d_n$samples$Diff_Baso)
d_n$samples$Diff_Mono <- as.numeric(d_n$samples$Diff_Mono)
d_n$samples$Diff_Lympho <- as.numeric(d_n$samples$Diff_Lympho)
rm(WBC)

d_n$samples$WBC_ratio <- ((d_n$samples$Diff_Neutro + d_n$samples$Diff_Eo + d_n$samples$Diff_Baso + d_n$samples$Diff_Mono)/d_n$samples$Diff_Lympho)
d_n$samples$WBC_ratio_log <- log(d_n$samples$WBC_ratio)

#Remove incomplete 
complete <- complete.cases(d_n$samples[, "WBC_ratio_log"])
d_n_WBC <- d_n[, complete]
rm(complete)

d_n_WBC$samples$life_history_stage <- as.factor(d_n_WBC$samples$life_history_stage)
d_n_WBC$samples$colony <- as.factor(d_n_WBC$samples$colony)
d_n_WBC$samples$ID <- as.factor(d_n_WBC$samples$ID)
d_n_WBC$samples$year <- as.factor(d_n_WBC$samples$year)
d_n_WBC$samples$group <- as.factor(d_n_WBC$samples$group)
d_n_WBC$samples$pair <- as.factor(d_n_WBC$samples$pair)
rm(d_n)
dim(d_n_WBC)
table(d_n_WBC$samples$pair)

#PC scores from genomic matrix
Genomic_PCS <- read_csv("GenomicPC_scores_GEP.csv")
Genomic_PCS <- subset(Genomic_PCS, select = c(PC1, PC2, PC3, PC4, PC5, ID.y, Sample))
colnames(Genomic_PCS) <- "ID"
Genomic_PCS$ID <- as.factor(Genomic_PCS$ID)
#Combine
d_n_all <- d_n_WBC
d_n_all$samples <- left_join(d_n_all$samples, Genomic_PCS, by = c("Sample", "ID"))
```

# PCA

Create a PCA plot to identify outliers.

```{r}
#| label: PCA_outlier
#| echo: FALSE
#| message: false
#Use PCA to identify outliers. F24_FWB_mum_start_2018B was already removed at an earlier state
cpm_mat <- cpm(d_n_all, log=TRUE)  #we need the log values
exprs_mat <- cpm_mat
exprs_t <- t(exprs_mat) #transpose
pca_result <- prcomp(exprs_t, center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)

pca_var <- pca_result$sdev^2                  
pca_var_explained <- pca_var / sum(pca_var)   
round(pca_var_explained[1:2] * 100, 2)

pc_scores <- as.data.frame(pca_result$x[, 1:2])  #keep PC1 and PC2
pc_scores$Sample <- rownames(pc_scores)
colnames(pc_scores) <- c("PC1_GE", "PC2_GE", "Sample")
pc_scores <- left_join(pc_scores, d_n_all$samples, by = "Sample")

PCA_LHS <- ggplot(pc_scores, aes(x = PC1_GE, y = PC2_GE, color = life_history_stage)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_classic() +
  stat_ellipse(type = "norm", size = 0.5) +
  xlim(-400, 150) +
  ylim(-150, 150) +
  labs(title = "(c) Life-history stage", x = "PC1_GE (23 %)", y = "PC2 (13 %)", color = NULL)

#levels(pc_scores$year)
levels(pc_scores$year) <- c("2019", "2020")
PCA_Y <- ggplot(pc_scores, aes(x = PC1_GE, y = PC2_GE, color = year)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_classic() +
  stat_ellipse(type = "norm", size = 0.5) +
  xlim(-400, 150) +
  ylim(-150, 150) +
  labs(title = "(b) Season", x = "PC1 (23 %)", y = "PC2 (13 %)", color = NULL)

#levels(pc_scores$group)
levels(pc_scores$group) <- c("Day 0", "Day 60")
PCA_TP <- ggplot(pc_scores, aes(x = PC1_GE_GE, y = PC2_GE, color = group)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_classic() +
  stat_ellipse(type = "norm", size = 0.5) +
  xlim(-400, 150) +
  ylim(-150, 150) +
  labs(title = "(d) Developmental time point", x = "PC1 (23 %)", y = "PC2 (13 %)", color = NULL)

PCA_C <- ggplot(pc_scores, aes(x = PC1_GE, y = PC2_GE, color = colony)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_classic() +
  stat_ellipse(type = "norm", size = 0.5) +
  xlim(-400, 150) +
  ylim(-150, 150) +
  labs(title = "(a) Density", x = "PC1 (23 %)", y = "PC2 (13 %)", color = NULL)

legend_theme_outlier <- theme(
    legend.position = c(0.05, 0.95), 
    legend.justification = c("left", "top"),  
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = alpha('white', 0.7), color = NA),  
    legend.key.size = unit(0.8, "lines"),
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12))

PCA_plots_outlier <- plot_grid(PCA_C + legend_theme_outlier + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()), 
                               PCA_Y + legend_theme_outlier + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                                                                      axis.title.y = element_blank()), 
                               PCA_LHS + legend_theme_outlier, 
                               PCA_TP + legend_theme_outlier + theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()), 
                               ncol = 2)
ggsave(here::here("Plots","PCA_plots_outlier_adj.png"), plot = PCA_plots_outlier, dpi = 600)

write.csv(pc_scores, file = here::here("GenesGO", "pc_scores_adj.csv"))
rm(exprs_mat, exprs_t, cpm_mat)
```

![Principle component analysis of raw data](Plots/PCA_plots_outlier.png) The PCA identified **one** outlier, which was removed from the dataset for further analysis.

```{r}
#| label: PCA
#| echo: FALSE
#| message: false
#Plot in accordance to LHS and TP
PCA_LHS <- ggplot(pc_scores, aes(x = PC1_GE, y = PC2_GE, color = life_history_stage, shape = life_history_stage)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_classic() +
  stat_ellipse(type = "norm", size = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(16,17)) +
  xlim(-200, 200) +
  ylim(-200, 200) +
  labs(title = "(c) Life-history stage", x = "PC1 (23 %)", y = "PC2 (13 %)", color = NULL, shape = NULL)

#levels(pc_scores$group)
levels(pc_scores$group) <- c("Day zero", "Day 60")
PCA_TP <- ggplot(pc_scores, aes(x = PC1_GE, y = PC2_GE, color = group, shape = group)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_classic() +
  stat_ellipse(type = "norm", size = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(16,17)) +
  xlim(-200, 200) +
  ylim(-200, 200) +
  labs(title = "(d) Developmental time point", x = "PC1 (23 %)", y = "PC2 (13 %)", color = NULL, shape = NULL)

#levels(pc_scores$year)
levels(pc_scores$year) <- c("2019", "2020")
PCA_Y <- ggplot(pc_scores, aes(x = PC1_GE, y = PC2_GE, color = year, shape = year)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_classic() +
  stat_ellipse(type = "norm", size = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(16,17)) +
  xlim(-200, 200) +
  ylim(-200, 200) +
  labs(title = "(b) Food availability", x = "PC1 (23 %)", y = "PC2 (13 %)", color = NULL, shape = NULL)

PCA_C <- ggplot(pc_scores, aes(x = PC1_GE, y = PC2_GE, color = colony, shape = colony)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_classic() +
  stat_ellipse(type = "norm", size = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(16,17)) +
  xlim(-200, 200) +
  ylim(-200, 200) +  
  labs(title = "(a) Density", x = "PC1 (23 %)", y = "PC2 (13 %)", color = NULL, shape = NULL)

legend_theme <- theme(
    legend.position = c(0.95, 0.95), 
    legend.justification = c("right", "top"), 
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = alpha('white', 0.7), color = NA), 
    legend.key.size = unit(0.8, "lines"), 
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12))

PCA_plots <- plot_grid(PCA_C + legend_theme + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()),
                       PCA_Y + legend_theme + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                                                      axis.title.y = element_blank()), 
                       PCA_LHS + legend_theme, 
   
                       
                                           PCA_TP + legend_theme + theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()),
                       ncol = 2)

ggsave(here::here("Plots","PCA_plots_adj.png"), plot = PCA_plots, dpi = 600)
rm(PCA_LHS, PCA_TP, PCA_Y, PCA_C)
```

![Principle component analysis of processed data](Plots/PCA_plots_adj.png)

# Differential gene expression analysis

In this section, we will perform differential gene expression analysis to identify genes that are differentially expressed between the four main contrasts: Time point, Life history stage, Colony and Season. Compared to previous analysis, in this section, we combined the four contrasts in one model, thus identifying differentially expressed genes while correcting for the other contrasts.

```{r}
#| label: color_scheme
#| echo: FALSE
clrs <- c("Upregulated" = "#FDA172", "Downregulated" = "#9867B5", "Not significant" = "grey20")
lfc <- 1 
adj.P.value <- 0.05
fig_theme <- theme(text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12),
                   legend.title = element_blank(),
                   legend.text=element_text(size=10),
                   axis.text.x = element_text(size =10),
                   axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10))

ann_colors <- list(
  TP = c("Day 0" = "#8B9E58", "Day 60" = "#638B9B"),
  LHS = c(Mother = "#C44B4E", Pup = "#C46A00")
)
```

## Combined analysis

Differential gene expression analysis combined for all contrasts and adding pair to control for repeated sampling and similarity between mums and pups.

```{r}
#| label: DEG_Combined
#| echo: FALSE

#You need to explicitly set the reference levels
#Time point = group will have both but for the rest
d_n_all$samples$life_history_stage <- relevel(d_n_all$samples$life_history_stage, ref = "Pup")
d_n_all$samples$colony <- relevel(d_n_all$samples$colony, ref = "FWB")
d_n_all$samples$year <- relevel(d_n_all$samples$year, ref = "2019_2020")

design_combined <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group + life_history_stage + colony + year, data = d_n_all$samples) #setting up model contrasts is more straight forward in the absence of an intercept 
colnames(design_combined)
contr.matrix.combined <- makeContrasts(
 end_vs_start = group2-group1,
 adult_vs_pup = life_history_stageMother,
 high_vs_low = colonySSB,
 Season1vsSeason2 = year2018_2019,
 levels = design_combined) #create matrix for contrasts
# Use voom to remove variance dependency on mean
vobj_combined <- voom(d_n_all, design_combined, plot=TRUE)
# 
# # Fit a random effect
dupcor_combined <- duplicateCorrelation(vobj_combined, design_combined, block = d_n_all$samples$pair)
dupcor_combined$consensus #the estimated intra individual correlation (0.1389558)
# #the intra individual correlation will change the voom weights slightly
# #run voom again considering the duplicateCorrelation results in order to compute more accurate precision weights
vobj_combined = voom(d_n_all, design_combined, plot=TRUE,
            block=d_n_all$samples$pair, correlation=dupcor_combined$consensus)
#update the correlation for the new voom weights
dupcor_combined <- duplicateCorrelation(vobj_combined, design_combined, block = d_n_all$samples$pair)
dupcor_combined$consensus #the estimated intra individual correlation (0.1389573)
#Fit the model
vfit_combined <- lmFit(vobj_combined, design_combined, block=d_n_all$samples$pair, correlation=dupcor_combined$consensus)
vfit_combined <- contrasts.fit(vfit_combined, contrasts=contr.matrix.combined)

# Fit Empirical Bayes for moderated t-statistics, empirical Bayes moderation is carried out by borrowing information across all the genes to obtain more precise estimates of gene-wise variability
efit_combined <- eBayes(vfit_combined)
topTable(efit_combined, n=20)
plotSA(efit_combined, main="Final model: Mean-variance trend")
plotMD(efit_combined)
abline(h=0,col="darkgrey")

#adjusted p-value cutoff that is set at 5% by default.
efit_combined$F
head(efit_combined$F.p.value) #pval of the moderated F-statistics (equivalent to one-way ANOVA)
head(efit_combined$p.value) #same
summary(decideTests(efit_combined, adjust.method="fdr"))
#set log-fold-changes (log-FCs) to be above a minimum value. 

tfit_combined <- treat(vfit_combined, lfc=lfc) #lfc = 1, lfc_half = 0.5
topTreat(tfit_combined)
nrow(tfit_combined)
dt_combined <- decideTests(tfit_combined, adjust.method="fdr")
summary(dt_combined) 
```

Outcome similar to the marginal differential gene expression analyses. We will proceed with correcting for the ratio of white blood cells.

### Adjusted combined

```{r}
#| label: DEG_Combined_Adjusted
#| echo: FALSE

design_combined_adj <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group + life_history_stage + colony + year + WBC_ratio_log, data = d_n_all$samples) 
nrow(design_combined_adj)

contr.matrix.combined.adj <- makeContrasts(
 end_vs_start = group2-group1,
 adult_vs_pup = life_history_stageMother,
 high_vs_low = colonySSB,
 Season1vsSeason2 = year2018_2019,
 levels = design_combined_adj)

# Use voom to remove variance dependency on mean,
#voom() converts the read counts to log2-cpm, with associated weights, ready for linear modelling
vobj_combined_adj <- voom(d_n_all, design_combined_adj, plot=TRUE)
# 
# # Fit a random effect
dupcor_combined_adj <- duplicateCorrelation(vobj_combined_adj, design_combined_adj, block = d_n_all$samples$pair)
dupcor_combined_adj$consensus #the estimated intra individual correlation (0.1339424)
# #run voom again considering the duplicateCorrelation results in order to compute more accurate precision weights
vobj_combined_adj = voom(d_n_all, design_combined_adj, plot=TRUE,
            block=d_n_all$samples$pair, correlation=dupcor_combined_adj$consensus)
#update the correlation for the new voom weights
dupcor_combined_adj <- duplicateCorrelation(vobj_combined_adj, design_combined_adj, block = d_n_all$samples$pair)
dupcor_combined_adj$consensus #the estimated intra individual correlation (0.1339639)

#Fit the model
vfit_combined_adj <- lmFit(vobj_combined_adj, design_combined_adj, block=d_n_all$samples$pair, correlation=dupcor_combined_adj$consensus)
vfit_combined_adj <- contrasts.fit(vfit_combined_adj, contrasts=contr.matrix.combined.adj)
# 
# Save the model to avoid recomputing everything
# save vfit_combined_adj
saveRDS(vfit_combined_adj, file = here::here("Models","vfit_combined_adj.rds"))

#Load vfit_combined_adj
vfit_combined_adj <- readRDS(here::here("Models","vfit_combined_adj.rds"))

efit_combined_adj <- eBayes(vfit_combined_adj)
topTable(efit_combined_adj, n=20)
plotSA(efit_combined_adj, main="Final model: Mean-variance trend")
plotMD(efit_combined_adj)
abline(h=0,col="darkgrey")

#adjusted p-value cutoff that is set at 5% by default.
efit_combined_adj$F
head(efit_combined_adj$F.p.value) 
head(efit_combined_adj$p.value) 
summary(decideTests(efit_combined_adj, adjust.method="fdr"))

tfit_combined_adj <- treat(vfit_combined_adj, lfc=lfc) #lfc = 1, lfc_half = 0.5
topTreat(tfit_combined_adj)
nrow(tfit_combined_adj)
dt_combined_adj <- decideTests(tfit_combined_adj, adjust.method="fdr")
summary(dt_combined_adj) 
```

Correcting for the white blood cell ratio does slightly change the differentially expressed genes, so we'll retain both and compare them moving forward.

We then added genomic relatedness via PC scores to the model to account for genetic relatedness among individuals

### Adjusted combined control for ID_Pairs 
 
```{r}
#| label: DEG_Combined_Pairs
#| echo: FALSE

design_pairs <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group + life_history_stage + colony + year + WBC_ratio_log + PC1 + PC2 + PC3 + PC4 + PC5, data = d_n_all$samples) 
nrow(design_pairs)
colnames(design_pairs)

contr.matrix.pairs <- makeContrasts(
 end_vs_start = group2-group1,
 adult_vs_pup = life_history_stageMother,
 high_vs_low = colonySSB,
 Season1vsSeason2 = year2018_2019,
 levels = design_pairs)

# Use voom to remove variance dependency on mean,
#voom() converts the read counts to log2-cpm, with associated weights, ready for linear modelling
vobj_pairs <- voom(d_n_all, design_pairs, plot=TRUE)
# 
# # Fit a random effect
dupcor_pairs <- duplicateCorrelation(vobj_all, design_pairs, block = d_n_all$samples$pair)
dupcor_pairs$consensus #the estimated intra individual correlation (0.1337848)
# #run voom again considering the duplicateCorrelation results in order to compute more accurate precision weights
vobj_pairs = voom(d_n_all, design_pairs, plot=TRUE,
            block=d_n_all$samples$pair, correlation=dupcor_pairs$consensus)
#update the correlation for the new voom weights
dupcor_pairs <- duplicateCorrelation(vobj_pairs, design_pairs, block = d_n_all$samples$pair)
dupcor_pairs$consensus #the estimated intra individual correlation (0.133939)

#Fit the model
vfit_pairs <- lmFit(vobj_pairs, design_pairs, block=d_n_all$samples$pair, correlation=dupcor_pairs$consensus)
vfit_pairs <- contrasts.fit(vfit_pairs, contrasts=contr.matrix.pairs)
# 
# Save the model to avoid recomputing everything
# save vfit_pairs
saveRDS(vfit_pairs, file = here::here("Models","vfit_pairs.rds"))

#Load vfit_pairs
vfit_pairs <- readRDS(here::here("Models","vfit_pairs.rds"))

efit_pairs <- eBayes(vfit_pairs)
topTable(efit_pairs, n=20)
plotSA(efit_pairs, main="Final model: Mean-variance trend")
plotMD(efit_pairs)
abline(h=0,col="darkgrey")

#adjusted p-value cutoff that is set at 5% by default.
efit_pairs$F
head(efit_pairs$F.p.value) 
head(efit_pairs$p.value) 
summary(decideTests(efit_pairs, adjust.method="fdr"))

tfit_pairs <- treat(vfit_pairs, lfc=lfc) #lfc = 1, lfc_half = 0.5
topTreat(tfit_pairs)
nrow(tfit_pairs)
dt_pairs <- decideTests(tfit_pairs, adjust.method="fdr")
summary(dt_pairs) 

#Test for significance
#Time point
Allgenes_end_vs_start_pairs <- as.data.frame(topTreat(tfit_pairs, coef = "end_vs_start", n = Inf))
Filtered_end_vs_start_pairs <- subset(Allgenes_end_vs_start_pairs, abs(logFC) >= lfc & adj.P.Val < adj.P.value)
Upregulated_end_vs_start_pairs <- subset(Filtered_end_vs_start_pairs, Filtered_end_vs_start_pairs$logFC >= lfc)
Downregulated_end_vs_start_pairs <- subset(Filtered_end_vs_start_pairs, Filtered_end_vs_start_pairs$logFC <= lfc)

#Life history stage
Allgenes_adult_vs_pup_pairs <- as.data.frame(topTreat(tfit_pairs, coef = "adult_vs_pup", n = Inf))
Filtered_adult_vs_pup_pairs <- subset(Allgenes_adult_vs_pup_pairs, abs(logFC) >= lfc & adj.P.Val < adj.P.value)
Upregulated_adult_vs_pup_pairs <- subset(Filtered_adult_vs_pup_pairs, Filtered_adult_vs_pup_pairs$logFC >= lfc)
Downregulated_adult_vs_pup_pairs <- subset(Filtered_adult_vs_pup_pairs, Filtered_adult_vs_pup_pairs$logFC <= lfc)

# Create a list to save the up and down regulated genes and the df containing all genes evaluated for GO analysis
Combined_list_pairs <- list(Allgenes_end_vs_start_pairs = Allgenes_end_vs_start_pairs, Upregulated_end_vs_start_pairs = Upregulated_end_vs_start_pairs, Downregulated_end_vs_start_pairs = Downregulated_end_vs_start_pairs, Allgenes_adult_vs_pup_pairs = Allgenes_adult_vs_pup_pairs, Upregulated_adult_vs_pup_pairs = Upregulated_adult_vs_pup_pairs, Downregulated_adult_vs_pup_pairs = Downregulated_adult_vs_pup_pairs)

# Loop through and save each data frame using `here()`
for (name in names(Combined_list_pairs)) {
  write.csv(Combined_list_pairs[[name]], file = here::here("GenesGO", paste0(name, ".csv")), row.names = TRUE)
}

#Significance
Allgenes_end_vs_start_pairs$Significance <- "Not significant"
Allgenes_end_vs_start_pairs$Significance[Allgenes_end_vs_start_pairs$adj.P.Val < adj.P.value & Allgenes_end_vs_start_pairs$logFC >= lfc] <- "Upregulated"
Allgenes_end_vs_start_pairs$Significance[Allgenes_end_vs_start_pairs$adj.P.Val < adj.P.value & Allgenes_end_vs_start_pairs$logFC <= -lfc] <- "Downregulated"
Allgenes_end_vs_start_pairs

Allgenes_adult_vs_pup_pairs$Significance <- "Not significant"
Allgenes_adult_vs_pup_pairs$Significance[Allgenes_adult_vs_pup_pairs$adj.P.Val < adj.P.value & Allgenes_adult_vs_pup_pairs$logFC >= lfc] <- "Upregulated"
Allgenes_adult_vs_pup_pairs$Significance[Allgenes_adult_vs_pup_pairs$adj.P.Val < adj.P.value & Allgenes_adult_vs_pup_pairs$logFC <= -lfc] <- "Downregulated"
Allgenes_adult_vs_pup_pairs

#Plot volcano plot
combined_tp_plot_pairs <- ggplot(Allgenes_end_vs_start_pairs, aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(adj.P.Val), color = Significance, size = Significance)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-1, 1), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_manual(values = clrs) +  
  scale_size_manual(values = c(1, 0.5, 1)) +
  labs(title = "(b) Developmental time point", x = expression("log"[2]*"FC"), y = expression("-log"[10]*" adjusted p-value")) +
  theme_classic() +
  ylim(0,50) +
  xlim(-4.2,4.2) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.title.position = "plot")

combined_lhs_plot_pairs <- ggplot(Allgenes_adult_vs_pup_pairs, aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(adj.P.Val), color = Significance, size = Significance)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-1, 1), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_manual(values = clrs) +  
  scale_size_manual(values = c(1, 0.5, 1)) +
  labs(title = "(a) Life-history stage", x = expression("log"[2]*"FC"), y = expression("-log"[10]*" adjusted p-value")) +
  theme_classic() +
  ylim(0,50) +
  xlim(-4.2,4.2) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.title.position = "plot")

```

Correcting for pc values accounting for genetic relatedness also slightly changed the differentially expressed genes, so we will move on with the analysis on this model.  

```{r}
#| label: Combined_Adjusted
#| echo: FALSE
#Plot for only time point and life history stage
DEG_Combined_TPLHS_pairs <- ggarrange(combined_lhs_plot_pairs + fig_theme, combined_tp_plot_pairs + fig_theme + theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()), common.legend = T, legend = "bottom", widths = c(1, 0.95))
ggsave(here::here("Plots","DEG_Combined_TPLHS_pairs.png"), plot = DEG_Combined_TPLHS_pairs, width = 7, height = 3.5, dpi = 600)
```



### Heatmap

Creating a heatmap to visualise the differentially expressed genes between the two contrasts with significantly differentiate genes.

```{r}
#| label: Heatmap_combined
#| echo: FALSE
### Time point & Life history stage
###Adjusted
#Time point
DEG_combined_tp_pairs <- rownames(Filtered_end_vs_start_pairs)

#Life history stage
DEG_combined_lhs_pairs <- rownames(Filtered_adult_vs_pup_pairs)

#Extract the expression values for the differentially expressed genes
expression_combined_tp_pairs <- vobj_pairs$E[DEG_combined_tp_pairs, ]
expression_combined_lhs_pairs <- vobj_pairs$E[DEG_combined_lhs_pairs, ]

#get labels (Time point)
annotation_combined_tp_pairs <- data.frame(TP = as.factor(d_n_all$samples$group))
rownames(annotation_combined_tp_pairs) <- d_n_all$samples$Sample
annotation_combined_tp_pairs$TP <- ifelse(annotation_combined_tp_pairs$TP == 1, "Day 0", "Day 60")
annotation_combined_tp_pairs$TP <- factor(annotation_combined_tp_pairs$TP, levels = c("Day 0", "Day 60"))

matrix_combined_tp_pairs <- expression_combined_tp_pairs[, order(annotation_combined_tp_pairs$TP)]
annotation_combined_tp_pairs <- annotation_combined_tp_pairs[order(annotation_combined_tp_pairs$TP), , drop = FALSE]

#get labels (Life history stage)
annotation_combined_lhs_pairs <- data.frame(LHS = as.factor(d_n_all$samples$life_history_stage))
rownames(annotation_combined_lhs_pairs) <- d_n_all$samples$Sample
annotation_combined_lhs_pairs$LHS <- factor(annotation_combined_lhs_pairs$LHS, levels = c("Mother", "Pup"))

#order the expression values
matrix_combined_lhs_pairs <- expression_combined_lhs_pairs[, order(annotation_combined_lhs_pairs$LHS)]
annotation_combined_lhs_pairs <- annotation_combined_lhs_pairs[order(annotation_combined_lhs_pairs$LHS), , drop = FALSE]

heatmap_combined_tp_pairs <- pheatmap(matrix_combined_tp_pairs,
                       scale = "row",  # normalize rows (genes)
                       color = colorRampPalette(c("#9D00FF", "white", "#FFA500"))(100),
                       annotation_colors = ann_colors,
                       annotation_col = annotation_combined_tp_pairs,
                       cluster_rows = TRUE,
                       treeheight_row = 0,
                       cluster_cols = FALSE,
                       gaps_col = cumsum(table(annotation_combined_tp_pairs$TP)),
                       show_rownames = F,
                       show_colnames = FALSE,
                       annotation_legend = FALSE,
                       legend = F,
                       fontsize = 12,
                       fontsize_col = 7,
                       fontsize_row = 6,
                       main = NA)

ggsave(here::here("Plots","heatmap_combined_tp_pairs.png"), plot = heatmap_combined_tp_pairs, width = 3.5, height = 5, dpi = 600)

heatmap_combined_lhs_pairs <- pheatmap(matrix_combined_lhs_pairs,
                       scale = "row",  # normalize rows (genes)
                       color = colorRampPalette(c("#9D00FF", "white", "#FFA500"))(100),
                       annotation_colors = ann_colors,
                       annotation_col = annotation_combined_lhs_pairs,
                       cluster_rows = TRUE,
                       treeheight_row = 0,
                       cluster_cols = FALSE,
                       gaps_col = cumsum(table(annotation_combined_lhs_pairs$LHS)),
                       show_rownames = F,
                       show_colnames = F,
                       annotation_legend = FALSE,
                       legend = F,
                       fontsize = 12,
                       fontsize_col = 7,
                       fontsize_row = 6,
                       main = NA)


ggsave(here::here("Plots","heatmap_combined_lhs_pairs.png"), plot = heatmap_combined_lhs_pairs, width = 3.5, height = 6, dpi = 600)
```

#GOterms using clusterProfiler

In this section, we are conducting a gene ontology (GO) enrichment analysis using Clusterprofiler to identify biological processes significantly associated with the differentially expressed genes in the time point and life history stage contrasts.

```{r}
#| label: load_packages_for_GO_combined
#| echo: FALSE
#BiocManager::valid()

options(repos = BiocManager::repositories())
BiocManager::install(version = "3.24", ask = FALSE)
BiocManager::install(c(
  "Biobase", "BiocGenerics", "BiocIO", "BiocParallel", "Biostrings",
  "cigarillo", "cpp11", "data.table", "DelayedArray", "DESeq2", "EBImage",
  "GenomicAlignments", "GenomicRanges", "IRanges", "KEGGREST", "ks",
  "MatrixGenerics", "Rhtslib", "Rsamtools", "rtracklayer", "S4Arrays",
  "S4Vectors", "Seqinfo", "SparseArray", "spatstat.utils",
  "SummarizedExperiment", "XVector"
), update = FALSE, ask = FALSE, force = TRUE)

invisible(pacman::p_load(dplyr, clusterProfiler, org.Hs.eg.db, enrichplot, ggplot2, VennDiagram, ggrepel))
```

## Call in DEG

```{r}
#| label: load_data_for_GO_combined
#| echo: FALSE
#Call up or down regulated genes from differential expression analysis
file_paths <- list.files(path = "GenesGO", pattern = "^(Upregulated|Downregulated).*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)

# Loop through and create data frames
for (file in file_paths) {
  name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file))      
  df <- read.csv(file) %>%
    mutate(X = toupper(X))
  colnames(df)[1] <- "GeneSymbol"
  assign(name, df, envir = .GlobalEnv)
}

Background_tp_pairs <- read.csv("GenesGO/Allgenes_end_vs_start_pairs.csv") %>%
  mutate(X = toupper(X))
colnames(Background_tp_pairs)[1] <- "GeneSymbol"

Background_lhs_pairs <- read.csv("GenesGO/Allgenes_adult_vs_pup_pairs.csv") %>%
  mutate(X = toupper(X))
colnames(Background_lhs_pairs)[1] <- "GeneSymbol"

rm(df, file, file_paths, name)
```

## Gene ontology: enrichment analysis

```{r}
#| label: Enrichment_analysis
#| echo: FALSE
#Go enrichment analysis for up and down regulated genes
#Time point
GO_end_vs_start_DOWN <- enrichGO(Downregulated_end_vs_start_pairs$GeneSymbol,
                       OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                       universe = Background_tp_pairs$GeneSymbol,  
                       keyType = "SYMBOL",
                       ont = "BP",
                       pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
                       pAdjustMethod = "BH") 
GO_end_vs_start_DOWN <- GO_end_vs_start_DOWN %>%
  mutate(Regulation = "Downregulated") 

GO_end_vs_start_UP <- enrichGO(Upregulated_end_vs_start_pairs$GeneSymbol,
                       OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                       universe = Background_tp_pairs$GeneSymbol,
                       keyType = "SYMBOL",
                       ont = "BP",
                       pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
                       pAdjustMethod = "BH") 
GO_end_vs_start_UP <- GO_end_vs_start_UP %>%
  mutate(Regulation = "Upregulated") 

#Life history stage
#Downregulated_lhs <- Downregulated_lhs[,-1]  #If the code doesn't run as it's supposed to
GO_adult_vs_pup_DOWN <- enrichGO(Downregulated_adult_vs_pup_pairs$GeneSymbol,
                       OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                       universe = Background_lhs_pairs$GeneSymbol,
                       keyType = "SYMBOL",
                       ont = "BP",
                       pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
                       pAdjustMethod = "BH") 
GO_adult_vs_pup_DOWN <- GO_adult_vs_pup_DOWN %>%
  mutate(Regulation = "Downregulated") 

GO_adult_vs_pup_UP <- enrichGO(Upregulated_adult_vs_pup_pairs$GeneSymbol,
                       OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                       universe = Background_lhs_pairs$GeneSymbol,
                       keyType = "SYMBOL",
                       ont = "BP",
                       pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
                       pAdjustMethod = "BH") 
GO_adult_vs_pup_UP <- GO_adult_vs_pup_UP %>%
  mutate(Regulation = "Upregulated")
```

## Top 20 enriched GOterms (biological process)

### Time point

```{r}
#| label: Top20_TP
#| echo: FALSE
#Combine
GO_end_vs_start_pairs <- rbind(as.data.frame(GO_end_vs_start_DOWN), as.data.frame(GO_end_vs_start_UP)) %>%
  arrange(p.adjust) 

write.csv(GO_end_vs_start_pairs, here::here("GenesGO", "GO_end_vs_start_pairs.csv"), row.names = F)

#Fancy smancy bubble plot
plot_end_vs_start_pairs <- ggplot(GO_end_vs_start_pairs, aes(x = zScore, y = -log10(p.adjust))) +
  geom_point(aes(size = Count, shape = Regulation, fill = Regulation), color = "black", alpha = 0.5) +

  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Upregulated" = 24, "Downregulated" = 25)) +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Upregulated" = "#FDA172", "Downregulated" = "#9867B5")) +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "DEG Count") +
  #Add the top terms to the plot
  geom_text_repel(
  data = GO_end_vs_start_pairs,  
  aes(label = ID),
  size = 2.5,
  segment.color = NA,
  max.overlaps = Inf
) +
  labs(
    title = "(b) Developmental time point",
    x = "Z-score",
    y = expression(-log[10]("Adjusted p-value")),
    shape = "Regulation"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 14),   
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),     
        legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm")) +
  guides(
  size = guide_legend(
    override.aes = list(shape = 24)  # use triangle in size legend
  ),
  fill = "none" 
)

#Top GO terms and description
GO_end_vs_start_pairs_table <- GO_end_vs_start_pairs[, c("ID", "Description")]
colnames(GO_end_vs_start_pairs_table) <- c("GO Term", "Description")
rownames(GO_end_vs_start_pairs_table) <- NULL

ggsave(here::here("Plots","Bubble_end_vs_start_pairs.png"), plot = plot_end_vs_start_pairs + fig_theme, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 600)
```

### Life history stage

```{r}
#| label: Top20_LHS
#| echo: FALSE
#Combine
GO_adult_vs_pup_pairs <- rbind(as.data.frame(GO_adult_vs_pup_DOWN), as.data.frame(GO_adult_vs_pup_UP)) %>%
  arrange(p.adjust) 

write.csv(GO_adult_vs_pup_pairs, here::here("GenesGO", "GO_adult_vs_pup_pairs.csv"), row.names = F)

#Fancy smancy bubble plot
plot_adult_vs_pup_pairs <- ggplot(GO_adult_vs_pup_pairs, aes(x = zScore, y = -log10(p.adjust))) +
  geom_point(aes(size = Count, shape = Regulation, fill = Regulation), color = "black", alpha = 0.5) +

  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Upregulated" = 24, "Downregulated" = 25)) +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Upregulated" = "#FDA172", "Downregulated" = "#9867B5")) +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "DEG Count") +
  #Add the top terms to the plot
  geom_text_repel(
  data = GO_adult_vs_pup_pairs,  
  aes(label = ID),
  nudge_y = 0.03,         #moves label up
  size = 2.5,
  segment.color = NA,
  force = 2, 
  max.overlaps = Inf
) +
  labs(
    title = "(a) Life-history stage",
    x = "Z-score",
    y = expression(-log[10]("Adjusted p-value")),
    shape = "Regulation"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 14),   
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),     
        legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm")) +
  guides(
  size = guide_legend(
    override.aes = list(shape = 24)  # use triangle in size legend
  ),
  fill = "none" 
)

#Top 20 GO terms and description
GO_adult_vs_pup_pairs_table <- GO_adult_vs_pup_pairs[, c("ID", "Description")]
colnames(GO_adult_vs_pup_pairs_table) <- c("GO Term", "Description")
rownames(GO_adult_vs_pup_pairs_table) <- NULL

ggsave(here::here("Plots","Bubble_adult_vs_pup_pairs.png"), plot = plot_adult_vs_pup_pairs + fig_theme,  width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 600)
```
